reach_why: Extends known concerns about recursive self-training, ontology lock-in, and evaluation dependence, but does not open wholly new territory.
novelty_why: Non-obviously links fallibilism, reframing scarcity, search-pool poisoning, and frame-dependent hard-to-vary judgments.
falsifiable_why: Testable via recursive training experiments measuring error amplification, anomaly handling, and dependence on external interpretive judgments.
explanation: Recursive improvement can entrench coherent nonsense when reframing is scarce and evaluation depends on inherited categories.
